provenance.capture_method: SYNTHESIZED for Story 4.5 (not a live capture): an energy-only fixture (the FlowModel consumes only the five *_power sensors + optional grid_status). RAW tesla_fleet/powerwall signs (battery -=charging, grid +=import, others >=0); the dialect normalizes to canonical before the model. Every power sensor stamped at reference_now so the freshness reader reads it fresh (measured) when now=reference_now.
provenance.notes: State 5b of 7 (the contrast partner of flow-charging.json): PLUGGED-IDLE. The SAME wall_connector node is PRESENT but quiescent (wc 0.0 < deadband -> direction:'none', no motion) — plugged in, not charging. grid forward (1.0), home reverse (1.0). solar/powerwall absent. The ONLY visual difference from charging is the wc edge's active/direction. Conserves: +1 (grid) -1 (home) +0 (wc) = 0.
